tool.name: service_version_detector
tool.description: Detect service versions through banner grabbing and fingerprinting for vulnerability identification.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Grab banners from network services - Identify specific software versions - Fingerprint web servers and frameworks - Detect outdated or vulnerable service versions - Map service versions to known CVEs

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The detection action to perform: - grab_banner: Grab service banner from a port - detect_version: Identify service version from banner - fingerprint_http: Fingerprint HTTP server and frameworks - check_vulnerabilities: Check version against known CVEs - full_scan: Complete version detection and vulnerability check

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Target host IP address or hostname

parameter.name: port
parameter.description: Target port number. Required for grab_banner, detect_version.

returns.description: Service version information, fingerprints, and potential vulnerabilities

tool.examples:
# Grab banner from SSH port
grab_banner 192.168.1.1 22
# Fingerprint HTTP server
fingerprint_http example.com 443
# Check version for vulnerabilities
check_vulnerabilities 192.168.1.1 22
# Full scan of multiple ports
full_scan 192.168.1.1 22,80,443,3306,5432
